message:
fix(fj-trace): make bind_input/bind_const_value/active_frame fallible instead of panicking

Replace expect()-based panics in SimpleTraceContext with proper Result<_, TraceError>
returns when the frame stack is empty, preventing UB in composition scenarios:

- bind_input() and bind_const_value() now return Result<TracerId, TraceError>
- active_frame() and active_frame_mut() return Result instead of panicking
- process_primitive() checks for empty frame stack before proceeding
- make_jaxpr helper functions propagate errors via collect::<Result<Vec<_>>>()
- Extract root_frame() constructor to eliminate inline TraceFrame literals
- Fuzz target shape_inference_engine handles fallible bind_input gracefully
- Fix durability.rs source_blocks cast for type consistency
- Add regression tests for empty frame stack scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -357,7 +357,7 @@ fn decode_from_sidecar_records(
         object_id,
         manifest.artifact_size as u64,
         manifest.symbol_size,
-        manifest.source_blocks,
+        manifest.source_blocks as _,
         manifest.symbols_per_block,
     );
